title: To His Kinswoman, Mrs. Penelope Wheeler.
content:
Next is your lot, fair, to be number'd one,
    Here, in my book's canonisation:
    Late you come in; but you a saint shall be,
    In chief, in this poetic liturgy.
meaning:
"To His Kinswoman, Mrs. Penelope Wheeler." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
